title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 268.031 - Recorded brands as evidence
text:
268.031.  Recorded brands as evidence. — No evidence of ownership by brand shall be permitted in any court in this state unless the brand shall be recorded as provided in sections 268.011 to 268.171.
(L. 1971 H.B. 134 § 3, A.L. 1992 H.B. 878)
